@graph.description: Valerian evidence is mixed: older systematic review/meta-analysis found possible subjective sleep/anxiety benefit and no severe adverse events, while umbrella-review evidence remains weak/inconclusive for insomnia. Extract quality and whole-root/rhizome preparation matter.
